2605.30680.title: Healthcare Mechanisms from Policy-as-Code Search under Strategic Provider Response
2605.30680.paper_summary: Healthcare mechanisms are inseparable from the strategic provider response they induce: existing healthcare AI benchmarks hold this response fixed and so cannot evaluate mechanisms by the equilibrium they produce. We recast hospital mechanism design as program synthesis for language models: typed, inspectable rule programs are executed and scored by Medi-Sim, a multi-agent simulator with five strategic provider channels (coding, selection, delay, effort, triage). An incentive sweep recovers classical health-economics findings as adjacent regimes -- up-coding and low-complexity-patient selection under profit pressure, and Goodhart-style drift where measured performance becomes anti-correlated with true outcomes -- and a single audit lever exposes pressure migration: closing the coding channel more than doubles low-complexity selection. LLM-guided evolutionary code search over the same rule-program space then synthesizes an inspectable mixed-objective program that eliminates up-coding, halves rejection, and retains most of the profit-oriented baseline's funds.
2605.30680.paper_summary_zh: 醫療保健機制與其引發的戰略提供者反應密不可分：現有的醫療保健 AI 基準將這一反應固定，因此無法通過其產生的均衡來評估機制。我們將醫院機制設計重新構想為語言模型的程序合成：類型化、可檢查的規則程序由 Medi-Sim 執行並評分，這是一個具有五個戰略提供者通道（編碼、選擇、延遲、努力、分診）的多代理模擬器。一個激勵掃描恢復了經典健康經濟學的發現，作為相鄰的體系——在利潤壓力下的上編碼和低複雜性病人選擇，以及 Goodhart 風格的漂移，其中測量的表現與真實結果反向相關——而單一的審計槓桿揭示了壓力遷移：關閉編碼通道使低複雜性選擇增加超過兩倍。然後，基於 LLM 指導的演化代碼搜索在相同的規則程序空間中合成了一個可檢查的混合目標程序，消除了上編碼，將拒絕率減半，並保留了大部分以利潤為導向的基線資金。
2605.30680.author: Zihan Wang et.al.
2605.30680.authors: Zihan Wang, Xiang Xu, Hongyuan Zha, Wenhao Li
